topic: Why creators should build AI systems, not just use AI tools
scene_guidance: Open with direct challenge statement to camera
Use fast text overlays for 'strategy -> system -> tools'
Show contrast cards: random tools vs repeatable system
Close on one-line operating rule in bold subtitles
visual_guidance: No fake dashboards or fabricated analytics claims
edit_guidance: Highlight failure snapshot with quick pause
Land final line with 1-beat silence before end
thumbnail_direction: Simple contrast title: 'Tools vs Systems' with bold creator-facing framing.

title_options: AI Tools Won't Save You (Build a System Instead)
Why AI Systems Beat AI Tools Every Time
metadata_direction.description_focus: Strategy-first creator systems, memory loops, quality gates, and repeatable AI workflows.
